cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
Speaker 2: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
Speaker 2: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest and
Speaker 3: on an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 1: Menendez is a terrorist.
Speaker 1: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 2: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 4: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
Speaker 4: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 4: Specter One, report.
Speaker 5: Need a sitrep.
Speaker 6: This isn't real.
Speaker 7: The hell it ain't!
Speaker 8: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 2: So eager to leave, David.
Speaker 2: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 1: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 4: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 9: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

auditTrail.detail: Joined the cross-chunk sentence fragment 'Raul Menendez ignited global unrest and' with 'on an unprecedented scale' while preserving speaker attribution across the boundary.
Normalized punctuation in Speaker 4 line to read 'Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.' for readability.
Omitted empty final chunk with no detected speech from the cleaned transcript.

debug.notes: Mechanical transcript contained one sentence split across chunks 0 and 1; retained all spoken content and normalized only punctuation/sentence joining. Speaker labels kept in generic normalized form as provided.
